title: Silent global auto-update enforcement policy
context: silent-update.sh currently (a) is never wired into SessionStart, and (b) only runs `npx paqad-ai@latest update` which regenerates project artifacts but never upgrades the installed global CLI. Fix wires it as a SessionStart hook and makes it run `npm install -g paqad-ai@latest`. Open questions: how strictly to enforce the 'only last two minor versions allowed' rule, and blocking vs background.

options.summary: Background-update within window; BLOCK session start until global reinstall finishes when >2 minors behind
Always spawn the global reinstall in the background; never block

rationale: Never block session start; always spawn npm install -g in background. Allowed window = latest minor and prior minor within same major; older minor or older major is out-of-window (logged as forced).
